title: Blaster Movement
description: Two new blasters that add more movement technology to Minecraft.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e20f4acdb7fdc313b63c7639445a05eadf0429a8.png)

This mod adds two new blasters to the game that let the player have more advanced movement. These are the Sky Blaster and the Boos Blaster. The blasters don't have a specific ammo but they have durability, these can be fixed using specific recipes in the crafting table. Also, these blasters can be enchanted with enchantments like Mending and Unbreaking.
----------------------------------------------------------------

*** Requires GeckoLib ***

https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions?g=1.20.1&l=forge

-----------------------------------------------------------------


## **Sky Blaster** This blaster impulses the player really high and generates an explosion that damages mobs around it. It does not grief the world (it doesn't destroy blocks). Durability: 50 **Crafting Recipe:**

![sky blaster recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc85016129b5160c6e7b83ed0a73c85f227eb75.png)

**Reload/Fix Recipe:**

![sky blaster fix recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2590ec3d5e91f54a52bdde1d5b17da8aa4c2e080.png)
## **Boost Blaster** This blaster impusles the player opposite to where the player is looking to. For example, if the player is facing North, when firing this blaster it will impulse you South. It doesn't do damage nor it breaks blocks, just impulse. Durability: 100 **Crafting Recipe:**

![boost blaster recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cafc78886f5b73113934d1fa7e584bfab56872a9.png)

**Reload/Fix Recipe:**

![boost blaster fix recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d79a321ae98257ac9937201f63fd242617aeea3.png)

That's all for this mod! Hope you enjoy it and if you have any suggestions tell me in the comments or join my server: https://discord.gg/Ecbk6P9dVB Made by RoCris
